channel.title: SkillFade Blog
channel.description: Essays on skill decay, retention, and calm, deliberate learning.

item.title: Modeling Skill Decay in ~40 Lines of Python
item.description: The forgetting curve isn't a metaphor. Here's how to model skill decay as data — input vs output, decay from last practice, and a small Python function.

item.title: Streaks Measure Attendance, Not Skill
item.description: A green streak proves you showed up, not that you still know anything. Why engagement metrics hide skill decay — and what to measure instead.

item.title: The Ebbinghaus Forgetting Curve, Explained for Developers
item.description: The forgetting curve shows how fast unused skills fade. Here's what Ebbinghaus actually found, and how developers can use it to keep skills sharp.
